notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Rangers challenged (tag play), call on the field was overturned: pitcher MacKenzie Gore picks off Samad Taylor at 1st on throw to first baseman Jake Burger.

notableEvents.label: Ty France GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Ty France grounds into a double play, shortstop Ezequiel Duran to second baseman Nicky Lopez to first baseman Jake Burger. Xander Bogaerts to 3rd. Jackson Merrill out at 2nd. Ty France out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Ty France rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Ty France grounds into a double play, shortstop Ezequiel Duran to second baseman Nicky Lopez to first baseman Jake Burger. Xander Bogaerts to 3rd. Jackson Merrill out at 2nd. Ty France out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Nicky Lopez singles on a ground ball to second baseman Fernando Tatis Jr. Nicky Lopez to 2nd. Nicky Lopez advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by second baseman Fernando Tatis Jr.

notableEvents.label: Gavin Sheets pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Gavin Sheets pops out to first baseman Jake Burger.

notableEvents.label: Gavin Sheets pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Gavin Sheets grounds out, shortstop Ezequiel Duran to first baseman Jake Burger.

notableEvents.label: Rodolfo Durán pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Rodolfo Durán pops out to third baseman Josh Jung in foul territory.

notableEvents.label: Will Wagner pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Will Wagner flies out to shortstop Ezequiel Duran.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Samad Taylor hits a sacrifice bunt. Throwing error by catcher Kyle Higashioka. Fernando Tatis Jr. to 3rd. Samad Taylor to 1st.

notableEvents.label: Cody Freeman pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Cody Freeman flies out to second baseman Fernando Tatis Jr.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
